testcase.name: App > renders without crashing
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: App > renders the sidebar
App > renders the landing page at root route
API Client > should export a default axios instance
API Client > should have a baseURL set
API Client > should have request interceptors configured
API Client > interceptor adds Authorization header when token exists
API Client > interceptor does not add Authorization header when no token
Header > renders the logo with alt text
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Header > renders Login and Sign up links
Header > Login link points to /login
Header > Sign up link points to /signup
Header > renders the Explore Trips button
Header > has a home link on the logo
Landing > renders landing headline
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. testcase.name: Landing > renders Login and Sign up action links
Landing > renders the features carousel section
Landing > renders the first feature card
Landing > renders carousel navigation
Sidebar > renders the brand name
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. testcase.name: Sidebar > renders all navigation items
Sidebar > navigation links point to correct paths
Sidebar > renders version number
Sidebar > highlights the active route
Dashboard > renders a greeting based on time of day
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `whileHover` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whilehover` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `whileTap` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whiletap` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Dashboard > renders the Add a New Trip button
Dashboard > renders the Routed logo
Dashboard > loads recommendations from API when logged in
Dashboard > does not load recommendations when not logged in
Dashboard > renders profile dropdown area
Dashboard > renders all four tabs (Recs, Received, Given, Messages)
Dashboard > shows "No pending recommendations" when there are no pending matches
Dashboard > renders recommendation cards for pending matches
Dashboard > can switch to the Received tab
Dashboard > displays received interests from localStorage
Dashboard > can switch to the Given tab and shows empty state
Dashboard > displays given interests with status badges
Dashboard > can switch to Messages tab and shows empty state
Dashboard > generates match messages for both_accepted matches from API
Dashboard > generates match messages for rejected matches from API
Dashboard > calls accept API when clicking accept on a recommendation
Dashboard > calls decline API when clicking decline on a recommendation
Dashboard > clears routed_match_messages on logout
Dashboard > auto-selects Received tab when there are received interests and no recommendations
Dashboard > accepts an interest and switches to Messages tab
Dashboard > declines an interest
Explore > renders the Explore page
Explore > renders a search input
Explore > fetches trips from API on mount
Explore > displays trips returned by the API
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `whileHover` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whilehover` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: Explore > filters trips by search query when logged in
Explore > shows empty state when no trips match search
Explore > shows auth modal for unauthenticated actions
Explore > shows "I'm Interested" button when logged in and viewing another user's trip
Explore > toggles interest on a trip and stores it in localStorage
Explore > shows ❤️ Interested after clicking interest button
Explore > does not show interest button for own trips
Explore > loads pre-existing interests from localStorage on mount
Explore > can remove interest by clicking the button again
Login > renders the login form heading

You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. testcase.name: Login > renders username and password fields
Login > renders the sign in button
Login > shows error when submitting empty form
Login > allows typing in username and password fields
Login > toggles password visibility
Login > calls API on valid submission
Login > stores token in localStorage on successful login
Login > shows error message on API failure
Login > renders link to sign up page
Matches > renders the page

testcase.name: Matches > fetches matches from API when logged in
Matches > displays matched travel partners
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `whileHover` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whilehover` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: Matches > only shows both_accepted matches (not pending or partial)
Matches > shows empty state when no matches and no interests
Matches > displays accepted interest matches from localStorage
Matches > shows interest match count badge
Matches > does not show accepted interest matches for other users
Matches > does not show pending interests in the matches page
Profile > shows loading state then renders profile after fetch

testcase.name: Profile > fetches profile from GET /users/me on mount
Profile > renders the profile page with username from API
Profile > displays the user email from API
Profile > renders all profile field labels
Profile > displays travel stats in the banner
Profile > displays bio from API
Profile > displays location from API
Profile > displays interests from API
Profile > shows placeholder text for empty fields
Profile > enters edit mode for username and saves via API
Profile > cancels username editing
Profile > enters edit mode for email and shows input with current value
Profile > saves email via PUT /users/me
Profile > enters edit mode for location and saves via API
Profile > enters edit mode for date of birth
Profile > enters edit mode for bio and saves via API
Profile > cancels bio editing
Profile > enters interest editing mode
Profile > adds a custom interest via typing
Profile > adds an interest from the dropdown list
Profile > removes an interest
Profile > saves interests via PUT /users/me
Profile > opens profile picture menu on click
Profile > logs out, clears localStorage, and navigates to home
Profile > settings dropdown has Dashboard, My Trips, and Explore links
Profile > renders Back to Dashboard link
Profile > redirects to login on 401 error
Profile > shows error message on API failure
Signup > renders the signup form heading

testcase.name: Signup > renders all required form fields
Signup > renders optional fields
Signup > shows error when submitting empty form
Signup > shows error when passwords do not match
Signup > shows error when password is too short
Signup > calls API on valid submission
Signup > shows API error on failure
Signup > has a link to login page
Suggestions > renders the heading
Suggestions > renders the description text
Trips > renders the page heading
Trips > renders My Trips and Shortlisted tabs
Trips > shows empty state when no trips exist
Trips > fetches trips from API on mount
Trips > can switch between My Trips and Shortlisted tabs
Trips > renders trip items from API data
testcase.system-err:
Received `true` for a non-boolean attribute `layout`.
If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: layout="true" or layout={value.toString()}.

testcase.name: Trips > falls back to localStorage on API error
Trips > displays trip status badge
Trips > displays travel mode, budget, and interests chips
Trips > shows username badge on trip card
Trips > shows and hides trip description on toggle
Trips > removes a trip from the list and calls API delete
Trips > updates localStorage when a trip is removed
Trips > opens edit form when Edit button is clicked
Trips > cancels editing and returns to view mode
Trips > saves edits via API and updates the card
Trips > persists edited trip to localStorage
Trips > renders shortlisted trips from localStorage
Trips > shows shortlisted trip interests as tags
Trips > shows shortlisted trip description
Trips > removes a shortlisted trip and updates localStorage
Trips > shows "Plan a similar trip" link for shortlisted trips
Trips > shows shortlisted empty state with Explore link
Trips > renders Back to Dashboard and Explore Trips links
